PreToolUse.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$input = $Input | ConvertFrom-Json; $protected = 'Sales_MTD|Order Qty|Avg Order Value|Sum of Transactions'; if ($input.toolName -match 'replace_string' -and $input.toolInput.filePath -like '*.tmdl' -and $input.toolInput.oldString -match $protected) { Write-Output '{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"permissionDecision\": \"ask\", \"permissionDecisionReason\": \"This measure is an intentional inconsistency for workshop demos. Are you sure you want to modify it?\"}}' }"
